title: poa pagophila var. langtangensis
intro: Poa pagophila var. langtangensis, also known as Langtang Meadow Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is native to the Himalayan region and is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, due to its bioactive compounds like flavonoids and saponins. In traditional medicine, Poa pagophila var. langtangensis is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in poultices or topical applications to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
